message:
test: add output capture extraction tests

Adds comprehensive tests for:
- ExtractCodeBlocks (markdown code block extraction)
- ExtractJSONOutputs (JSON object/array detection)
- ExtractFileMentions (file path extraction with action inference)
- ExtractCommands (shell command detection)
- OutputCapture storage (ring buffer, filtering, stats)
